sprint: World Builder — "Everytime I Delete It Reappears": Local Delete Now Also Removes the Cloud Backup
task: everytime i delete it reappears -- a real bug hit doing fresh manual testing right after Cloud-Primary Project Storage Phase 6 shipped. Root cause: an earlier fix ("Delete No Longer Cascades") made local Delete remove only the local draft, never the Cloud Backup, to protect against a since-superseded quota-failure scenario -- but Phase 3 of this same effort later made an orphaned Cloud Backup (no local match) auto-materialize with ZERO click required, silently invalidating that earlier fix's own safety assumption. Fixed: _deleteLocalDraft now also removes the Project's own Cloud Backup (ProjectSync.remove), sequenced so that removal settles before the screen re-renders, closing the race. The Published Theme (a genuinely different, potentially shared consumer) stays completely untouched, unlike the original problematic cascade. See CLAUDE.md's own entry for the full account.
